content_body:
Great multi Family trip!! We had such an amazing time enjoying this beautiful cabin. The hot tub was a hit with both kids and adults. The cabin was perfectly set up for two families.

Our children, 6-13 years old, enjoyed exploring ~ they found a river (the Toccoa River), railroad tracks (for the Blue Ridge Scenic Railway), and a picnic area down the road.

We enjoyed the patio area outside and wonderful views. WHAT an amazing tub in the master bedroom!

We loved all the large windows throughout the cabin, and when it snowed - WOW!! It was beautiful.

Thank you again!
title: Multi-family Trip to Blue Ridge
